`,(0,e.jsx)(s.p,{children:"Instead of embedding ratings as an attribute within the Player class, we delegate this responsibility to ScoreTracker. By isolating this logic in ScoreTracker, we also open the door to future enhancements, such as supporting players in multiple leagues with distinct ratings."}),`
